entities.name: LANTANA CAMARA
entities.description: An invasive shrub whose residue was incorporated into the soil to study its effects on soil properties and crop yield

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal grain crop grown as part of the rice-wheat cropping system

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain crop grown as part of the rice-wheat cropping system

entities.name: PALAMPUR
entities.description: The specific site in Himachal Pradesh where the long-term experiment was conducted

entities.name: HIMACHAL PRADESH
entities.description: The Indian state where the research study took place

entities.name: RESIDUE INCORPORATION
entities.description: The process of adding organic matter from Lantana camara L. into the soil at various levels

entities.name: TILLAGE PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural soil preparation methods including puddling and soil compaction

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A primary plant nutrient applied to rice and wheat crops

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A primary plant nutrient applied to rice and wheat crops

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A chemical property of the soil that increased with lantana residue application and strongly influenced crop yield

entities.name: PH
entities.description: A measure of soil acidity or alkalinity that increased with lantana residue application

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Soil microorganisms whose population increased following lantana residue incorporation

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: Soil microorganisms whose population increased following lantana residue incorporation

entities.name: ACTINOMYCETES
entities.description: Soil microorganisms whose population increased following lantana residue incorporation

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS SOLUBILIZING MICROORGANISM
entities.description: Soil microorganisms that increase phosphorus availability and whose population increased with lantana residue

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the rice crop, significantly influenced by soil organic carbon and microbial counts

entities.name: WHEAT YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the wheat crop, significantly influenced by soil organic carbon and microbial counts

entities.name: RICE-WHEAT CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: The agricultural practice of alternating rice and wheat crops in the same field

relationships.description: residue of this organism was incorporated into the soil
